data.description: Smoke-test round of manual exercising of cmux by a human. Walks through core workflows (surfaces, splits, tabs, workspaces, sockets) to catch regressions not covered by the automated suite. Also the first ticket created in this Lattice instance — doubles as a test that ticket creation, listing, and dashboard rendering work end-to-end.
data.title: Another round of human testing

data.reason: Human testing round considered complete at v0.11.0 prod cut

provenance.reason: Human testing round considered complete at v0.11.0 prod cut
CMUX-era board cleanup before c11 demo (2026-06-04): all closed CMUX tickets archived; live keepers renamed to C11-123..129
